markets.name: OKC wins YES/NO
markets.description: Does Oklahoma City win the matchup? YES shares pay $1 if YES.

markets.name: BTC above $100k by year-end
markets.description: Play-money binary on Bitcoin crossing $100,000 USD before settlement date.

markets.name: Fed cuts rates before May meeting
markets.description: YES if the FOMC announces a rate cut on or before the May decision window.

markets.name: 2028 popular vote margin over 5%
markets.description: YES if the winning presidential ticket’s popular-vote margin exceeds five percentage points (sim rules).

markets.name: S&P 500 hits new all-time high in Q3
markets.description: YES if the S&P 500 index prints a new record closing high during the third calendar quarter.

markets.name: ETH spot ETF weekly net inflows positive
markets.description: YES if aggregate reported net inflows for ETH spot ETFs are positive for the settlement week.

markets.name: WTI crude finishes week above $80
markets.description: YES if front-month WTI settles above $80/bbl on the Friday reference print.

markets.name: NFC East division winner
markets.description: Resolves YES for the franchise that wins the NFC East (play-money; not affiliated with the NFL).

markets.name: AL Cy Young: pitcher X finishes top 3
markets.description: YES if the named starter receives Cy Young vote share placing them in the top three (sim criteria).

markets.name: Champions League final goes to extra time
markets.description: YES if the final is tied after 90 minutes and proceeds to extra time or penalties.

markets.name: US CPI year-over-year below 3%
markets.description: YES if the reported headline CPI year-over-year change is strictly below 3% for the release month.

markets.name: Frontier model leads public benchmark
markets.description: YES if the designated model ranks #1 on the reference public leaderboard on the snapshot date.

markets.name: Best Picture winner is a drama
markets.description: YES if the Academy Award for Best Picture goes to a film classified as drama under sim rules.

markets.name: Category 3+ hurricane makes Florida landfall
markets.description: YES if a named Atlantic hurricane at Cat 3+ intensity makes landfall in Florida this season.

markets.name: Starship completes orbital test objectives
markets.description: YES if the referenced flight meets published mission success criteria (sim; not affiliated with operators).
